overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy exploring a tribal settlement constructed from wood and rope. The character traverses elevated walkways and bridges within a lush, sunlit environment featuring primitive architecture and scattered NPC villagers.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal village ground level with wooden huts and scaffolding

agents.ego_description: walking through the tribal village examining wooden structures and decorations

notable_agents.action: villager sitting beside a wooden cart near the scaffolding

entered.detail: large wooden structure with thatched roof and tribal decorations
tall wooden support structure with rope bindings
large wooden wheel leaning against a post
red and white tribal banners suspended from wooden poles

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through a narrow tribal village path surrounded by wooden huts and scaffolding. A villager sits near a wooden cart on the left while red fabric banners hang overhead. The ground is sandy dirt with sparse vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden rope bridge connecting village platforms

events.description: character steps from ground level onto elevated wooden bridge structure

agents.ego_description: climbing the wooden ramp and crossing the suspended rope bridge

entered.detail: elevated walkway constructed from wooden planks and rope bindings
thick rope handrails wrapped around wooden posts
large rocky mountain formation visible through the bridge structure

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a wooden rope bridge leaving the ground village behind. The bridge features thick rope railings and wooden planks, with views of distant rock cliffs ahead. The tribal huts fall behind to the left as the bridge climbs higher.

scene_state.functional_zone: open rocky terrace with scattered vegetation and ancient ruins

events.description: exits wooden bridge onto open rocky terrain with red soil and vegetation
character turns right to follow the path along the ridge line

agents.ego_description: navigating the rocky path and turning toward the overlook area

notable_agents.action: child villager walking along the rocky path ahead

entered.detail: reddish rocky terrain with patches of grass and dirt
rusted metal wreckage partially buried in the ground
defensive wooden fence with sharpened spikes
group of palm trees providing shade on the right side

segments.scene_description: Aloy steps off the bridge onto open rocky terrain with red soil and scattered vegetation. Ancient metal debris lies to the left while a wooden spike barricade appears on the right. A child NPC walks ahead as the character turns right along the ridge path.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated wooden overlook with panoramic valley and settlement views

events.description: steps onto elevated wooden walkway providing overlook of the valley below
character slows and pans camera to survey the panoramic landscape view

agents.ego_description: walking along the overlook and pausing to survey the distant landscape and settlement

entered.detail: raised wooden platform extending along the cliff edge
defensive barrier with sharpened wooden stakes
panoramic view of tribal structures and ruins in the valley below
tall rocky outcrop rising above the jungle canopy

segments.scene_description: The character walks along an elevated wooden overlook with panoramic views of the valley settlement below. A wooden spike fence lines the left side while distant rock formations and jungle vegetation fill the background. The camera pans slowly to take in the expansive vista as the character continues along the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from the intimate, enclosed paths of a tribal village to an expansive, elevated overlook of the surrounding valley. It begins with Aloy navigating a narrow sandy path lined with wooden huts, scaffolding, and hanging red banners. As she moves forward, the perspective shifts upward as she climbs a wooden rope bridge, leaving the village dwellings behind in favor of a rising view toward distant rock cliffs. The scene then opens onto a rocky ridge of red soil and ancient metal debris before turning right along a path marked by a wooden spike barricade. Finally, the camera pans across a wide vista as she walks along an elevated wooden overlook, revealing the sprawling settlement below against a backdrop of jungle vegetation and towering rock formations.
